scripts.docker:fresh: docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml --env-file .env down -v && docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml --env-file .env build --no-cache && docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml --env-file .env up
scripts.docker:build: docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml --env-file .env down && docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml --env-file .env build --no-cache && docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml --env-file .env up
scripts.docker:backend: docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml --env-file .env build --no-cache api && docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml --env-file .env up -d postgres redis minio minio-init api
scripts.docker:backend_up: docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml --env-file .env up -d postgres redis minio minio-init api
scripts.frontend: turbo run build --filter=frontend && turbo run dev --filter=frontend
scripts.db:migrate: pnpm --filter api exec prisma migrate dev
